agent_stats.outcome_reasoning: The document defines the Article 4 Direction boundary for the Hampstead Garden Suburb Conservation Area. I identified page 20 as the primary map page (1:1250 scale with clear boundary and cartographic detail). Using the place name 'Hampstead Garden Suburb', I proposed a center which yielded a very strong match (1649 inliers) and perfect road name agreement (16/16 roads matched). Although the scale consistency was low (0.49), the extremely high inlier count and perfect road agreement confirm the match is correct and the affine transformation has accurately absorbed the scale variation. I committed this match for the single area group.
